code: import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from"../../context/AuthContext";import{Wallet,BarChart3,LogOut,DollarSign,Target}from'lucide-react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=_ref=>{let{isDarkTheme,toggleTheme}=_ref;const{user,logout}=useAuth();const location=useLocation();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleLogout=()=>{logout();navigate('/login');};if(!user)return null;const navItems=[{path:'/dashboard',icon:Wallet,label:'Dashboard'},{path:'/expenses',icon:Wallet,label:'Expenses'},{path:'/income',icon:DollarSign,label:'Income'},{path:'/budget',icon:Target,label:'Budget'},{path:'/analytics',icon:BarChart3,label:'Analytics'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-brand",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Wallet,{size:24}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"SmartSpend"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-links",children:navItems.map(item=>{const Icon=item.icon;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:item.path,className:"nav-link ".concat(location.pathname===item.path?'active':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{size:18}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:item.label})]},item.path);})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-user",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"theme-toggle-nav",onClick:toggleTheme,title:isDarkTheme?'Switch to Light Mode':'Switch to Dark Mode',children:isDarkTheme?'☀️':'🌙'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["Hello, ",user.name]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleLogout,className:"logout-btn",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LogOut,{size:18})})]})]});};export default Navbar;
